Home / Service Areas / Edina

Epoxy-flooring in Edina, MN

Trusted local professionals serving Edina and surrounding communities

Serving Edina, MN

Horizon Epoxy Flooring provides high-end epoxy flooring solutions in Edina, MN, where homeowners value quality and style. Our coatings resist extreme cold and heavy use, making them perfect for garages, basements, and high-traffic areas. Edina’s upscale homes deserve floors that combine durability with elegance, and our seamless, glossy finishes deliver just that. Trust us for flawless installations that elevate your space.

Edina’s affluent neighborhoods demand flooring that balances luxury with long-lasting performance.

Epoxy-flooring Services in Edina

Garage Floor Epoxy

Heavy-duty protection against road salt, oil stains, and subzero temperatures.

Learn more →

Basement Floor Coating

Moisture-proof floors for finished basements and rec rooms.

Learn more →

Commercial Epoxy Flooring

Code-compliant solutions for retail, breweries, and medical facilities.

Learn more →

Decorative Flake Flooring

Vibrant, durable finishes that brighten Minnesota's gray winters.

Learn more →

Concrete Repair & Leveling

Fixes for Minnesota's frost-heaved and spalled concrete.

Learn more →

Need Epoxy-flooring in Edina?

Contact us today for a free estimate. We provide professional, reliable service throughout Edina and the surrounding area.
